requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — DOSM Conformity and Tropical Environment Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——DOSM合格评定及热带环境要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——DOSM合格評定及熱帶環境要求

summary.en: Laos' Department of Standards and Metrology (DOSM), operating under the Ministry of Science and Technology, is the national standards and conformity assessment body. DOSM adopts IEC standards through the regional ASEAN framework and bilateral technical cooperation. IEC 61851-1 (general requirements for conductive EV supply equipment) and IEC 61851-23:2023 (DC EV charging stations) provide the internationally-recognised safety baseline applicable to EV charger imports and installations in Laos. DOSM conformity assessments for electrical equipment reference IEC safety standards. Enclosure protection is a significant Laos-specific concern: the tropical climate requires IP54 minimum for indoor/sheltered installations, IP65 for outdoor AC chargers, and IK10 mechanical impact protection for public-access equipment. High ambient humidity (>80% in wet season), heavy monsoon rainfall, dust in the dry season, and sustained temperatures of 35–40 °C create environmental stresses materially different from Northern China design baselines.
summary.zh: 老挝标准计量局（DOSM）隶属于科技部，是国家标准化和合格评定机构。DOSM通过东盟区域框架和双边技术合作采纳IEC标准。IEC 61851-1（电动汽车传导供电设备通用要求）和IEC 61851-23:2023（直流电动汽车充电站）提供了适用于老挝电动汽车充电桩进口和安装的国际公认安全基线。DOSM对电气设备的合格评定参照IEC安全标准。防护等级是老挝特有的重要关注点：热带气候要求室内/遮蔽安装至少达到IP54，室外交流充电桩达到IP65，公共使用设备达到IK10机械冲击防护。雨季高环境湿度（>80%）、强季风降雨、旱季扬尘及35–40°C持续高温所形成的环境压力与中国北方设计基线存在实质性差异。
summary.zht: 寮國標準計量局（DOSM）隸屬於科技部，是國家標準化和合格評定機構。DOSM通過東盟區域框架和雙邊技術合作採納IEC標準。IEC 61851-1（電動汽車傳導供電設備通用要求）和IEC 61851-23:2023（直流電動汽車充電站）提供了適用於寮國電動汽車充電樁進口和安裝的國際公認安全基線。DOSM對電氣設備的合格評定參照IEC安全標準。防護等級是寮國特有的重要關注點：熱帶氣候要求室內/遮蔽安裝至少達到IP54，室外交流充電樁達到IP65，公共使用設備達到IK10機械衝擊防護。雨季高環境濕度（>80%）、強季風降雨、旱季揚塵及35–40°C持續高溫所形成的環境壓力與中國北方設計基線存在實質性差異。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP65 outdoor AC, IP54 sheltered, IK10 mechanical impact
DOSM (Laos Department of Standards and Metrology) — conformity assessment framework for electrical imports
Lao PDR Electrical Safety Regulations — under Ministry of Energy and Mines

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is a useful design reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports accepted by DOSM or a Laos conformity assessment route. China domestic EVSE is typically designed and tested for Northern China climate conditions (cold winters, dry summers) rather than Laos' tropical conditions, meaning enclosure humidity, condensation, mould, and high-temperature derating must be explicitly re-validated.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据是有用的设计参考，但不能替代DOSM或老挝合格评定路径认可的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。中国国内EVSE通常针对中国北方气候条件（寒冷冬季、干燥夏季）设计和测试，而非老挝热带条件，因此外壳湿度、冷凝、霉菌及高温降额须明确重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據是有用的設計參考，但不能替代DOSM或寮國合格評定路徑認可的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。中國國內EVSE通常針對中國北方氣候條件（寒冷冬季、乾燥夏季）設計和測試，而非寮國熱帶條件，因此外殼濕度、冷凝、黴菌及高溫降額須明確重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: (1) an IEC 61851-1 clause-level compliance matrix; (2) accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; (3) IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC charging stations; (4) IP65 / IP54 / IK10 enclosure protection test certificates; (5) thermal derating evidence specifically reviewed against Laos tropical ambient conditions (35–40 °C sustained, >80% humidity wet season); (6) condensation, humidity, and mould resistance evidence for enclosures; (7) installation instructions covering Laos monsoon-season installation and maintenance requirements. A GB/T 18487 test report alone is not accepted as IEC 61851 evidence without a clause-level gap assessment. The tropical climate review is a Laos-specific gap not addressed by China domestic type-test documentation.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：(1) IEC 61851-1逐条合规矩阵；(2) ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全认可测试报告；(3) 直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据；(4) IP65 / IP54 / IK10防护等级测试证书；(5) 针对老挝热带环境条件（持续35–40°C、雨季湿度>80%）专项审查的热降额证据；(6) 外壳冷凝、湿度和防霉证据；(7) 涵盖老挝雨季安装和维护要求的安装说明。仅凭GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。热带气候审查是中国国内型式试验文件未涉及的老挝特有差距。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：(1) IEC 61851-1逐條合規矩陣；(2) ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全認可測試報告；(3) 直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據；(4) IP65 / IP54 / IK10防護等級測試證書；(5) 針對寮國熱帶環境條件（持續35–40°C、雨季濕度>80%）專項審查的熱降額證據；(6) 外殼冷凝、濕度和防黴證據；(7) 涵蓋寮國雨季安裝和維護要求的安裝說明。僅憑GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。熱帶氣候審查是中國國內型式試驗文件未涉及的寮國特有差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DOSM references IEC 61851 as the applicable safety framework for EV charger conformity; IP-rated enclosure protection and tropical thermal review are required for Laos climate; confirm exact DOSM conformity assessment route and project-owner requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Laos without additional accredited testing; China domestic climate test evidence does not cover Laos tropical conditions

source.publisher: DOSM — Department of Standards and Metrology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Laos-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates, and an explicit tropical climate thermal review. Humidity, condensation, and mould resistance are Laos-specific requirements not typically covered by China domestic type-test documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向老挝的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、IP防护等级认证书，以及明确的热带气候热环境审查。湿度、冷凝和防霉是中国国内型式试验文件通常未涵盖的老挝特有要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向寮國的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、IP防護等級認證書，以及明確的熱帶氣候熱環境審查。濕度、冷凝和防黴是中國國內型式試驗文件通常未涵蓋的寮國特有要求。
